sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Inc. (PANW): One of the Best Stocks to Buy According to Nancy Pelosi
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (PANW) is highlighted as one of the top stocks to buy, drawing attention due to Nancy Pelosi's significant call option exercise in late 2024 and CEO Nikesh Arora's recent $10 million stock purchase. The company is advancing with a platformization strategy, integrating individual security products into a unified solution, leading to strong net retention rates and low churn. This strategy, coupled with insider confidence, signals a bullish outlook for the cybersecurity firm.

feed.title: Charles River Highlights Effectiveness of VCGs in Toxicology
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. has released a retrospective analysis demonstrating the effectiveness of Virtual Control Groups (VCGs) in nonclinical toxicology studies. The study, published in Regulatory Toxicology and Pharmacology, showed 100 percent concordance in No Observed Adverse Effect Level (NOAEL) and preserved scientific integrity while significantly reducing the reliance on animal models. This initiative is part of Charles River's Alternative Methods Advancement Project (AMAP) and aligns with global industry collaborations, including the VICT3R Project, to advance regulatory acceptance and adoption of VCGs.

feed.title: John Deere agrees to pay $99 million to farmers over claims they’re monopolizing repairs and overcharging farmers
feed.summary: John Deere has agreed to a $99 million settlement with farmers who accused the company of monopolizing equipment repairs and overcharging them. The lawsuit highlighted how modern farm machinery, controlled by proprietary software, restricted farmers' ability to fix their own equipment, forcing them to use authorized dealers. While the settlement provides compensation and expands access to some tools, critics argue it may not fully address the "right to repair" issue, which affects various software-controlled products beyond farming.

feed.title: Tesla registers its AI-driven voice assistant in Shanghai
feed.summary: Tesla has registered its AI-powered voice assistant with China's cyberspace administrator in Shanghai, making it one of 158 AI functionalities to complete the filing process. This move is part of China's efforts to regulate rapidly developing AI technology and helps Tesla compete in the world's largest auto market, where it is trying to defend its share against local EV firms. Tesla has previously indicated plans to integrate other local AI voice controls in its China models.

feed.title: BILL Holdings Raises Full-Year Guidance After Strong Q2 Earnings Beat
feed.summary: BILL Holdings (BILL) exceeded Q2 FY2026 earnings expectations with core revenue of $375 million, up 17% year-over-year, and expanded its non-GAAP operating margin to 18%. The company accelerated revenue growth, particularly in its Spend & Expense segment, and subsequently raised its full-year FY2026 core revenue guidance to $1.490 billion–$1.510 billion. Despite operating at a GAAP loss, BILL is significantly compressing this loss, demonstrating sustained operational leverage and multiproduct momentum, which analysts believe could lead to substantial upside for the stock.

feed.title: Recent Report Shows That Rep. Dwight Evans Sold Up to $50K Worth of Micron Technology Stock
feed.summary: Representative Dwight Evans recently sold between $15,001 and $50,000 worth of Micron Technology stock, with the transaction occurring on March 24, 2026. This sale is part of his 30 stock transactions totaling over $71,000 in the past three years. Congressional transactions, while not primary investment advice, can offer insights into representatives' expectations for stock performance.

feed.title: Tesla registrations plunge in California, industry body says
feed.summary: Tesla's vehicle registrations in California dropped by 24.3% in the first quarter of 2026, marking the steepest decline for the company in the state. This decline is part of a broader trend, as overall zero-emission vehicle sales in California have also shrunk significantly, indicating a loss of momentum for the electric vehicle sector in a crucial U.S. market.

feed.title: EBAY Maintains by B of A Securities -- Price Target Raised to $1
feed.summary: B of A Securities maintained its Neutral rating on eBay (EBAY) but raised the price target from $102 to $110. Despite a strong GF Score of 83, GuruFocus indicates eBay is 47.9% overvalued at its current price of $106.14, with significant insider selling suggesting caution for investors.

feed.title: Chipotle Revives Best-Selling Menu Item After Rabid Fan Demand
feed.summary: Chipotle is bringing back its popular Honey Chicken, a limited-time offering that blends sweet and spicy flavors, to restaurants worldwide in April 2026. This item previously launched in March 2025 and became the chain's best-performing limited-time offering due to high customer demand. To celebrate its return, Chipotle is offering a $0 delivery fee on orders including Honey Chicken placed through their app or website from April 28 to May 11.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. (VST): One of the Best Stocks to Buy According to Nancy Pelosi?
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. (VST) is highlighted as one of the best stocks to buy, partly due to Nancy Pelosi exercising call options on the company. The article notes Vistra's position as an integrated retail electricity and power generation company and its significant role in providing nuclear power to AI hyperscalers like Meta Platforms through a massive 20-year power purchase agreement. This has boosted institutional confidence, positioning Vistra as a high-value asset in the AI era.

feed.title: BMO, Teck, TC Energy CEOs to Advise Carney on US Strategy on New Panel
feed.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney is enlisting top Canadian business executives, including the CEOs of Bank of Montreal, TC Energy, and Teck Resources, to serve on a new advisory committee. This panel will provide advice and strategy on Canada's economic relationship with the United States. The new committee replaces the Council on Canada-US Relations formed by the previous Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau, and includes a diverse group of business leaders, former politicians, and industry representatives, reflecting Canada's broad economic interests in the crucial US trade relationship.

feed.title: Americans Paid Trump's Tariff: Corporations Get The Refund - Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ:COST), FedEx (NYSE
feed.summary: The U.S. Customs and Border Protection has opened a tariff refund portal, allowing corporations to claim back $166 billion in unlawful duties imposed during the Trump administration. While consumers bore the cost of these tariffs, only "importers of record" can file for refunds, leading to a one-time boost in corporate profitability. Class-action lawsuits are emerging as consumers seek direct refunds, and a secondary market for tariff refund claims has developed among hedge funds.

feed.title: 3M (MMM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: 3M reported solid Q1 2026 operating performance with EPS up 14%, driven by productivity and cost discipline, despite a light start to the top line. The company reaffirmed full-year guidance, anticipating accelerated growth in the latter half of the year due to strong order trends and new product introductions. Strategic moves include portfolio shaping with the Madison Fire and Rescue acquisition and significant investments in manufacturing automation, alongside managing macro uncertainties like oil price inflation.

feed.title: Jayshree Ullal (ANET) files Form 144 reporting three stock sales
feed.summary: Jayshree Ullal, an insider at Arista Networks (ANET), filed Form 144 reporting proposed sales of Common Stock in three transactions. The filing details sales on April 13, 2026, April 16, 2026, and April 20, 2026, totaling 768,951 shares with aggregate proceeds exceeding $123 million. These transactions originated from stock option exercises from 2008 and 2013 and were processed via Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC.

feed.title: U.S. Banking Giant to Lay Off 777 at Lakewood Facility
feed.summary: PNC Bank is set to lay off 777 employees at its Lakewood, Colorado facility beginning June 30, 2026. This mass layoff is part of the bank's operational streamlining efforts following its acquisition of FirstBank in January 2026. The move will also see FirstBank customer accounts and services transitioned to PNC's network and digital platforms.

feed.title: Halliburton (HAL) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Halliburton (HAL) reported Q1 2026 earnings, noting flat total revenue year-over-year at $5.4 billion, with international revenue up 3% and North America down 4%. The company highlighted the impact of Middle East disruptions, leading to increased logistics costs and an estimated negative EPS impact, while signaling early signs of recovery in North America and robust growth in Latin America and Europe/Africa. Management emphasized the long-term implications of these geopolitical changes on energy security and underscored Halliburton's strategic positioning to thrive in a tighter global oil and gas market, supported by technological advancements and key contract wins.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences Deploys $16 Billion in 60 Days: Is GILD Stock Undervalued for 2026?
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has deployed over $16 billion in acquisitions within 60 days, adding significant new assets to its pipeline while its core HIV business continues to grow. These strategic moves, combined with upcoming commercial launches and a strong existing portfolio, suggest that GILD stock, currently trading 16% below Wall Street's mean target, may be undervalued. The article explores both bull and bear cases, highlighting the potential for substantial growth balanced by integration complexities and binary pipeline risks.

feed.title: Astec Industries names Chad Hartley infrastructure group president By Investing.com
feed.summary: Astec Industries, Inc. announced the appointment of Chad Hartley as Group President of Infrastructure Solutions and a member of its Executive Leadership Team, effective May 11, 2026. Hartley brings extensive manufacturing experience from Regal Rexnord and Emerson Electric. This announcement follows strong financial performance by Astec Industries, including significant stock gains and exceeding analyst expectations in its Q4 2025 earnings report.

feed.title: Apple Hospitality REIT Inc To Go Ex-Dividend On April 30th, 2026 With 0.08 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Apple Hospitality REIT Inc. is scheduled to go ex-dividend on April 30th, 2026. The company will issue a dividend of $0.08 USD per share. This indicates a regular dividend payment to shareholders.

feed.title: Lung cancer drug data from Black Diamond gets ASCO oral slot
feed.summary: Black Diamond Therapeutics (Nasdaq: BDTX) announced that it will present multiple Phase 2 silevertinib data sets at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. An oral presentation on frontline EGFRm NSCLC results is scheduled for May 30, 2026, while poster presentations will cover recurrent NSCLC and a randomized GBM trial. The company's stock has historically seen negative short-term reactions following clinical trial announcements despite positive data.

feed.title: Black Diamond Therapeutics Announces Oral Presentation of
feed.summary: Black Diamond Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: BDTX) is presenting multiple updates on its drug silevertinib at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting. The presentations include oral results from a Phase 2 study of silevertinib in frontline non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) patients with non-classical EGFR mutations, as well as poster presentations for previously treated NSCLC patients and a trial-in-progress for glioblastoma (GBM) patients. Silevertinib is an oral, brain-penetrant fourth-generation tyrosine kinase inhibitor designed to target various EGFR mutations in cancer.

feed.title: Public Storage stock hits 52-week high at $313.0 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $313.0, showing a year-to-date gain of 21.52%. The company has maintained dividend payments for 46 consecutive years and recently completed a $500 million senior notes offering. Analysts from Mizuho, BMO Capital, Truist Securities, and Argus have issued varying ratings on PSA following its financial results and the acquisition of National Storage Affiliates.

feed.title: Associated Bank launches franchise banking unit, hires team By Investing.com
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp has launched a new Franchise Banking unit to offer specialized financial solutions to franchise owners and operators nationwide. The bank has hired Shaun Coard as senior vice president and business segment leader for the new unit, along with four other professionals, who will operate from Minneapolis. This expansion adds to Associated Bank's portfolio of industry-specific specialty businesses, following strong financial performance and recent mergers.

feed.title: Transcript : Northern Trust Corporation, Q1 2026 Earnings Call, Apr 21, 2026
feed.summary: This article is a transcript of Northern Trust Corporation's Q1 2026 Earnings Call, which took place on April 21, 2026. The earnings call discusses the company's financial results for the first quarter of 2026. However, the full content of the transcript is reserved for subscribers.

feed.title: AstraZeneca’s Ultomiris Hits Interim Phase III Endpoint In IgAN, Eyes Accelerated Filings
feed.summary: AstraZeneca's drug Ultomiris has successfully met its interim Phase III endpoint for Immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN). This achievement positions the company to pursue accelerated regulatory filings for the treatment. The positive trial results mark a significant step forward in addressing this rare kidney disease.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Edison International(EIX.US) With Sell Rating, Raises Target Price to $70
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated its Sell rating on Edison International (EIX.US) but has increased its price target for the stock to $70. This adjustment suggests an updated valuation perspective despite maintaining a cautious stance on the company.

feed.title: 30 Duke lineworkers move on as utility drills for faster outage repair
feed.summary: Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) lineworkers from the Carolinas participated in the 2026 Carolinas Lineman's Rodeo, with 30 regional winners advancing to the International Lineman's Rodeo in October. This event emphasizes hands-on safety training, quicker outage restoration, and grid reliability. The competition helps sharpen real-world skills, reinforce safety standards, and ultimately leads to a more resilient grid and faster restoration times for customers.

feed.title: New lawsuit claims P&G's Charmin Mega sizing is based on a phantom product consumers can't actually buy
feed.summary: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Procter & Gamble, alleging that the company deceives shoppers about the size of its Charmin Mega toilet paper. The lawsuit claims P&G uses a "phantom" Charmin Regular roll as a baseline for comparison, a product that is not widely available to consumers and is priced to inflate the perceived value of its Mega line. Furthermore, the complaint alleges shrinkflation, where the sheet count of the Regular roll has been quietly reduced, thereby shrinking the equivalent Mega products without shoppers noticing.

feed.title: Five ASCO studies put Bicycle Therapeutics' cancer drug in focus
feed.summary: Bicycle Therapeutics plc (NASDAQ: BCYC) announced it will present data from five abstracts at the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) 2026 Annual Meeting. These presentations will include an oral presentation and multiple poster sessions detailing interim analysis results from Duravelo-2, focusing on zelenectide pevedotin (BT8009) in combination with pembrolizumab, for patients with urothelial carcinoma. The company is developing a new class of therapeutics based on its proprietary bicyclic peptide technology.

feed.title: This Mohawk Industries Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 2 Downgrades For Tuesday
feed.summary: Baird analyst Timothy Wojs downgraded Mohawk Industries Inc. (NYSE: MHK) from Outperform to Neutral and reduced its price target from $156 to $118. Additionally, Wedbush analyst Yun Zhong downgraded Passage Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: PASG) from Outperform to Neutral, lowering its price target from $32 to $8. These actions reflect a shift in outlook for both companies by prominent Wall Street analysts.

feed.title: A shot every 12 weeks controlled myasthenia gravis in Phase 3
feed.summary: Regeneron announced positive Phase 3 NIMBLE trial results for cemdisiran in generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG), demonstrating rapid, deep, and sustained disease control with subcutaneous dosing every 12 weeks. The trial met its primary and key secondary endpoints, showing significant improvements in MG-ADL and QMG scores compared to placebo. Regeneron has submitted a U.S. regulatory application and plans EU filings in 2026, positioning cemdisiran as a potential first-in-class siRNA therapeutic for gMG.

feed.title: Moderna wins EU nod for combined COVID, flu shot (MRNA:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Moderna has received marketing authorization from the European Commission for its mCOMBRIAX (mRNA-1083) vaccine. This single-dose messenger RNA-based vaccine is designed to target both COVID-19 and influenza, representing a significant step in combined respiratory virus prevention. The shot is cleared for the prevention of both influenza disease and COVID-19.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Rises Modestly as Investors Await Q1 Earnings on AI Momentum
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class C shares saw a modest gain of 0.26% as investors anticipate its Q1 2026 earnings report, with a strong focus on Google Cloud growth, AI advancements, and the impact of significant capital spending. Analysts expect strong revenue growth, primarily from advertising and cloud computing, despite concerns over rising capital expenditures weighing on near-term margins. The upcoming earnings call will provide crucial insights into AI return on investment, cloud customer acquisitions, and overall financial guidance amidst the ongoing AI race and antitrust challenges.

feed.title: Skyworks will discuss Q2 results and outlook after close May 5
feed.summary: Skyworks (Nasdaq: SWKS) has announced that it will release its second quarter fiscal 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026, after market close, followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. EDT. The earnings release will be available via GlobeNewswire and on the company's investor website, with a replay and transcript of prepared remarks accessible from 9:00 p.m. EDT on the same day. Historically, similar earnings date announcements from Skyworks have resulted in minimal stock price movement, with investors typically focusing more on the actual earnings results and outlook.

feed.title: Skyworks Sets Date for Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS) announced it will host a conference call on May 5, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT, to discuss its second quarter fiscal 2026 results and business outlook. The company will issue an earnings press release via GlobeNewswire after market close on May 5, prior to the call. Investors can access the live webcast and a playback of the call, along with a transcript of prepared remarks, on Skyworks’ investor relations website.

feed.title: Skyworks Sets Date for Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS) will host a conference call on May 5, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT to discuss its second quarter fiscal 2026 results and provide a business outlook. The earnings press release will be issued via GlobeNewswire after the market closes on May 5, prior to the call. Investors can access the press release and listen to the conference call through Skyworks' investor relations website.

feed.title: CVS Pharmacy makes cold & cough relief easier with delivery straight to your door
feed.summary: CVS Pharmacy has introduced same-day delivery for over-the-counter cold and cough medications containing pseudoephedrine (PSE) or ephedrine (EPH) in 32 states. This service allows customers to purchase these products online and have them delivered, eliminating the need to visit a store when experiencing symptoms. To comply with federal and state regulations, an identity verification process via ID.me is required for these purchases, ensuring compliance with legal restrictions on these ingredients.

feed.title: Raymond James Investment Management Names Kristi Higgins Head of ETF Strategy
feed.summary: Raymond James Investment Management has appointed Kristi Higgins as Head of ETF Strategy to expand its active exchange-traded fund business, driven by increasing investor demand for lower-cost, tax-efficient investment vehicles. Higgins will focus on scaling the firm's active ETF platform and developing new products with its boutique investment teams. This move reflects a broader industry trend where asset managers are accelerating active ETF launches and integrating internal investment capabilities into packaged ETF offerings.

feed.title: Kroger Spotlights E-commerce Growth with Online Deal Days Push
feed.summary: Kroger is launching its "Online Deal Days" promotion from April 22 to May 5, aiming to boost e-commerce engagement for Pickup and Delivery services. The initiative responds to continued consumer demand for speed, value, and convenience in online grocery shopping. Offers include discounts on first orders and free delivery on orders over $50, reflecting Kroger's strategy to further integrate digital solutions.

feed.title: Halliburton upbeat on post-Iran war business outlook, predicts US drilling resurgence
feed.summary: Halliburton reported its first-quarter 2026 earnings, which were in line with analyst expectations, showing similar revenues and earnings compared to the prior year. The company is optimistic about its business outlook following the Iran war, forecasting higher oil and gas prices, as well as an increase in US drilling and completions. Halliburton anticipates an improved financial performance in the coming period.

feed.title: Berenberg Initiates Palo Alto Networks at Buy: Is AI the Next Inflection for Cybersecurity's Quality Compounder?
feed.summary: Berenberg initiated coverage of Palo Alto Networks (PANW) with a Buy rating and a $215 price target, hailing the company as a "quality compounder" in cybersecurity. The investment firm highlighted Palo Alto's diversified security platforms, consistent financial execution with non-GAAP operating margins over 30%, and strategic acquisition of AI security firm Koi for $400 million. Berenberg views AI as a significant long-term growth catalyst for Palo Alto Networks, which is well-positioned to capitalize on increasing enterprise spending on integrated security solutions.

feed.title: Transcript: Atlantic Union Bankshares Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Atlantic Union Bankshares reported solid Q1 2026 results, with annualized loan growth of 2.2% and total loans reaching $27.9 billion, supported by the successful integration of Sandy Spring Bank. The company expects year-end loan balances between $29 billion and $30 billion, with core customer deposits driving growth despite planned reductions in high-cost broker deposits. While net interest income guidance for the full year has been revised to $1.34 billion to $1.35 billion due to lower accretion income and rising deposit costs, management remains optimistic about market opportunities and credit quality, projecting annual growth in tangible book value per share of 12% to 15%.

feed.title: Vrbo announces 2026 top vacation rentals of the year
feed.summary: Vrbo has announced its fifth annual list of Vacation Rentals of the Year for 2026, recognizing over 50 standout properties globally. These rentals, all earning a "Loved by Guests" badge, demonstrate exceptional quality and reliability based on guest reviews, with many boasting perfect 10/10 ratings. The list aims to inspire travelers and highlights properties with unique amenities and high standards in popular destinations.

feed.title: 424B2
feed.summary: This preliminary pricing supplement describes Autocallable Contingent Coupon Equity Linked Securities issued by Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., and linked to the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 indices. These securities offer potential for periodic contingent coupon payments but expose investors to risks including significant loss of principal, lack of liquidity, and credit risk of the issuers, with performance solely dependent on the worst performing underlying index. The document details key terms such as payment at maturity, automatic early redemption conditions, and various risk factors.

feed.title: BreachLock Named Representative Vendor in the 2026 Gartner Market Guide for Adversarial Exposure Validation
feed.summary: BreachLock, a leader in offensive security, has been recognized as a representative vendor in the 2026 Gartner Market Guide for Adversarial Exposure Validation. This marks their first inclusion in the AEV category since launching an AI-powered platform in 2025. BreachLock is noted for uniquely offering adversarial exposure validation, Penetration Testing as a Service (PTaaS), and Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM) within a single unified platform.

feed.title: Goldman Names Fintech Banker Gido Co-Chair of Financials Group
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has appointed Jeff Gido as co-chair of its financial institutions group within investment banking. Gido, a veteran fintech banker who joined the firm in 2001, will focus on driving commercial opportunities and advising key clients, especially in the fintech sector. This move elevates his role within the company's investment banking division.

feed.title: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc Stock (CRWD) Moved Up by 5.11% on Apr 21: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (CRWD) stock rose by 5.11% due to an analyst upgrade from Keybanc to Overweight with a $525 price target and the company's expanded Managed Security Service Provider (MSSP) strategy in Japan and Asia-Pacific. The move is also attributed to increasing demand for AI-driven cybersecurity, highlighted by their "Mythos technology" and involvement in "Project Glasswing." Despite positive news, the article notes risks including high valuation, a pending lawsuit from Delta Air Lines, and consistent insider selling.

feed.title: ServiceNow Inc Stock (NOW) Moved Up by 4.05% on Apr 21: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NOW) stock increased by 4.05% on April 21, driven by anticipation of Q1 2026 earnings, recent strategic acquisitions like Armis, and the unveiling of new AI-native solutions. Analysts maintain largely positive ratings, citing the company's expanding cybersecurity offerings and pervasive AI integration as key growth factors. Although some price targets have been adjusted, the overall sentiment points to ServiceNow's strong position in the growing enterprise AI market.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Inc Stock (PANW) Moved Up by 3.84% on Apr 21: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock increased by 3.84% on April 21st, driven by positive analyst ratings, strategic product launches, and expanding partnerships within a growing cybersecurity market. Berenberg initiated coverage with a "Buy" rating, while Cantor Fitzgerald and Piper Sandler reiterated "Overweight" ratings. The company recently launched a secure browser for businesses and expanded its SASE offering, capitalizing on increased demand for unified, AI-driven security solutions.

feed.title: Cinco de Mayo meets Taco Tuesday, and Old El Paso built a merch box
feed.summary: Old El Paso is celebrating a rare "Taco Totality" on May 5th, where Cinco de Mayo and Taco Tuesday coincide. To mark this occasion, which won't happen again until 2037, the company is releasing a limited-edition Taco Totality Gear Box. The box includes new Old El Paso TABASCO® Sauce flavored taco shells, a themed T-shirt, a neck pillow, and "Multi-Spectrum Taco Shield Glasses."
